homepage.hero_body: Increase sortation capacity inside your existing facility. Compact, modular, and designed and manufactured in the UK. Available on flexible lease — from £1,000/month. TEST

announcements.text: ⚡ Work out your ROI, monthly lease & system cost —

homepage.stat2_note: per month — subject to spec & finance approval
homepage.feat1_desc: Add or reconfigure 300mm cassette modules as your operation grows. Capacity scales with your business — not your building.
homepage.feat2_desc: Critical components are designed for rapid swap-out. Mean time to repair is 15 minutes — keeping your operation running at peak.
homepage.feat3_desc: Swivel wheel divert technology delivers up to 20,000+ parcels per hour with 3 sort directions across any parcel size mix.
homepage.feat4_desc: No extensions, no planning permission, no disruption to live operations. Helix installs inside your existing building envelope.
homepage.feat5_desc: 87% of components manufactured in-house. Shorter lead times, faster support, and a supply chain free from global disruption risk.
homepage.feat6_desc: Every Helix system ships with a 24-month standard warranty — not a paid extra. We stand behind our engineering.
homepage.dark_lead: Every component is specified, tested, and refined for parcel sortation environments. Purpose-built, not adapted.
homepage.proof1_desc: Full control over quality, lead time, and supply chain risk — from our UK facility.
homepage.proof2_desc: Cassette-style modules swap in under 15 minutes — no specialist tools required.
homepage.proof3_desc: Every system ships with 24 months as standard — not as a paid extra.
homepage.proof4_desc: Left, right, straight — maximising destination density without increasing footprint.
homepage.cta_lead: Enter your throughput, parcel mix, and destinations. Get system size, cost, ROI, and monthly finance options — entry systems from £4,000/month on a 60-month lease. Ready to share internally.

helix-product.cta_h2: Configure a Helix systemaround your operation
helix-product.cta_lead: Enter your throughput, destinations, and parcel mix. Get a live system layout, cost estimate, ROI calculation, and finance options in minutes.

products.hero_sub: From high-speed parcel sortation to pallet handling and food-grade conveyors — Orion MIS designs, manufactures, and integrates systems built around your specific operation.
